payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute administrative SQL commands.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user and does not contain durable personal memory to store.

details: Administrative SQL command was not executed.
No memory cards were created or modified.
